docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SEAN DONOVAN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC SHAW IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IS FILED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DONOVAN, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONOVAN, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, ERIC
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
